task: Extract AWS EC2 instance IDs from CloudTrail logs. Instance IDs follow the pattern 'i-' followed by 17 hexadecimal characters.
Parse an AWS Lambda function configuration and extract the environment variables, handler name, and timeout value into a structured format.
Write a Python function that takes an S3 bucket name and returns True if it follows AWS naming conventions (lowercase, no underscores, 3-63 characters), False otherwise.
